Split two ways: (a) 5 were the node's OWN namespace attaches `global.GLUDSP = вЂ¦` / `global.GlucoDex = global.GlucoDex || вЂ¦` (IIFE root `global` typed Window). These are DECLARED in a new node-scoped glucodex-globals.d.ts (`declare var GLUDSP/GlucoDex: any`), NOT inline-cast вЂ” CRUCIAL: a family of source-text safety gates in tests/dex-tests.js slices each node's `<node>LoadOwnExport` body on the VERBATIM attach marker (`gsrc.indexOf('global.GlucoDex = global.GlucoDex')` @ dex-tests.js:8464; ecgdex/cpapdex/ppgdex carry the same marker gate), so an inline `/** @type {any} */(global).X` cast rewrites that line, the marker vanishes, and the gate collapses (learned the hard way here). Declaring keeps the attach byte-identical. (b) the other 2 are genuine internal type-inference casts вЂ” `let run=/** @type {any} */(null)` and `/** @type {any} */(r).events=` вЂ” comment-only. RULE for the rest: declare a DSP's own `global.<Node>` namespace attaches ambiently (byte-stable for the marker gates); only cast genuine internal property/inference errors.
